title: Java New OreUI
description: This resourcepack has Bedrock edition‘s OreUI.This UI is good.
body:
# Version
This is a minecraft java edition.Version 1.21.5-1.21.11
# Features
This pack add oreui to minecraft.This pack add xearo's map icons,add crafing table ui,set all ui to oreui.
# Bug
This pack in not good every gui.Some GUI is not Covered。
